sourcesContent:
arr = [1, 2, 3]
total = 0
for x in arr
  total += x
for x, i in arr
  total += x * i
obj = {a: 1, b: 2}
keys = ""
for own k of obj
  keys += k
for k, v of obj
  total += v
for i in [1..3]
  total += i
for x in arr when x > 1
  total += x
squares = (x * x for x in arr)
evens = (x for x in arr when x % 2 == 0)
names = (k for k of obj)
